first_proving_slice_packet.objective: Land the zero-ambiguity bootstrap control packet layer and prove canonical builder execution through foundry-owned records.

acceptance_evidence_requirements: Foundry packet and deploy candidate path
candidate_evidence_requirements: Candidate record references acceptance evidence artifacts
Promotion status or rollback event is recorded for the proving candidate
rollback_target_requirements: Rollback target captures the previous candidate or packet snapshot
Rollback target is recorded before promotion
Rollback target is replayable without ad hoc operator memory
